summary:
Fixed the “duplicate apply after snapshot” bug.

Cause  
InstallSnapshot restored the state machine and lastApplied, but it never moved commitIndex forward. After a crash–restart, commitIndex = 0 dragged lastApplied back to 0, so entries 1-10 were replayed and applied a second time.

Fix (app/snapshot.go)  
1. After accepting a snapshot, advance commitIndex to at least LastIncludedIndex.  
2. Then restore the state machine and set lastApplied to LastIncludedIndex.

Outcome  
Running test.sh now passes in all rounds:

=== Raft Snapshot Commit-Gap Test ===  
PASS: No duplicate state machine transitions across all rounds

The needle has been found and removed.
